title: How to include current share Price of a ticker symbol into a board couloumn
excerpt:
I would like to include the current share Price based on a Ticker symbol given in a coloumn. Any ideas of how to achieve this in an elegant way? 
The aim is to inlcude this into an investment board.

posts.author: EVOCEAN (Philip Zollinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to include the current share Price based on a Ticker symbol given in a coloumn. Any ideas of how to achieve this in an elegant way?

The aim is to inlcude this into an investment board.
